ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "ctc" INTEGER /* Cost to Company (CTC) offered by the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the company's relationship with the university (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  "placement_type" TEXT /* Type of placement (e.g., internship, full-time) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was posted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job posting */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the job is based */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary offered for the job */,
  "experience_required" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required */,
  "skills_required" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student (e.g., student, admin) */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (GPA) of the student */,
  "resume_url" TEXT /* URL of the student's resume */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being reviewed */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student leaving the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text left by the student */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting related to the review */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student applying */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)
